text: Habib Bank Limited (HBL) offers personal, home, car, business loans. Minimum monthly income required: PKR 30,000. Minimum credit score: 650. Maximum loan amount: PKR 5,000,000. Interest rate range: 12% - 18%. Maximum tenure: 60 months. Processing fee: 1% of loan amount.

HBL eligibility criteria: Accepted employment types: Salaried, Self-Employed. Minimum employment duration: 12 months. Maximum debt-to-income ratio allowed: 45%. Guarantor: Not required. Insurance: Required. Credit score threshold: 650. Income threshold: PKR 30,000/month.

HBL required documents for loan application: CNIC, salary slip, bank statement 6 months, employment letter. Special conditions: Salaried employees only for personal loans. Home loans require property documents..

HBL loan products: personal, home, car, business. Interest rates: 12% - 18%. Loan amounts from PKR 10,000 up to PKR 5,000,000. Repayment tenure up to 60 months. Special conditions: Salaried employees only for personal loans. Home loans require property documents..
